## 2026-07-08

### Impact

- Fixes an issue where the close button could be invisible in the Uplink browser.

### Changes

- Fixes an issue where app-wide navigation appearance changes were clashing with our Uplink browser's navigation bar. In some cases the bar button items could be invisible. The navigation bar now controls its own appearance and button tints. 

### Products

- Deposit
- Switch
- Manage

### Requirements

| Name  | Version |
| ----- | ------- |
| Xcode | >= 26.1 |
| iOS   | >= 15.0 |
